title: ChatPushConfig fields use String not enum: urgency values unvalidated at type level
description: urgency and mention_urgency are String fields. The spec enumerates exactly four valid values: very-low, low, normal, high. Users constructing ChatPushConfig with an invalid string get no compile-time or library-level rejection — the error surfaces as a server-side invalidArguments response at runtime. This will generate repeated issues from users who typo urgency values. The supported set is server-advertised via ChatPushCapability.supported_urgency_values, which makes a static enum imperfect, but at minimum a newtype or validation on construction would make the contract explicit.
close_reason: design decision: urgency values are extensible per spec, String type is appropriate
